title: Reactor for multiphasic reactions
abstract: A reactor for multiphasic reactions which comprises a body manufactured in a single part which comprises a plurality of parallel tubes is provided. The parallel tubes are arranged for containing a catalyst and also for circulation of reactant in contact with the catalyst and wherein the internal diameter of such tubes is less than 4 mm. A reaction unit which comprises a reactor, a housing, inlets and outlets and a preheater is also provided. Methods for manufacturing such reactor are also provided.
claims:
Claims 1 . A reactor for multiphasic reactions comprising: a body manufactured in a single part, comprising a plurality of parallel tubes arranged for containing a catalyst and for circulation of a reactant in contact with a catalyst, wherein an internal diameter of the tubes is less than 4 mm. 2. The reactor according to claim 1 , wherein the internal diameter of the tubes is preferably between 1 - 3 mm and more preferably between 1 - 2.2 mm. 3. The reactor according to claims 1 or 2, further comprising an inlet connector at one end of the plurality of tubes for feeding the reactant, and an outlet connector at the other end of the tubes for the outlet of the products of the reaction. 4. The reactor according to any claims 1 - 3, further comprising fins attached on the outer surfaces of the tubes. 5. The reactor according to claim 4, wherein the fins extend between each tube and other adjacent tubes. 6. The reactor according to any claims 1 - 5, wherein the body of the reactor is formed by an additive manufacturing technique. 7. The reactor according to claim 6, wherein the additive manufacturing technique is Selective Laser Melting (SLM). 8. The reactor according to any claims 1 - 7, further comprising catalyst particles in the tubes. 9. The reactor according to claim 8, wherein the catalyst particles have a particle size between 0.15 - 0.3 mm. 10. A reaction unit comprising: at least a reactor according to any claims 1 - 9, a housing for receiving the reactor, an inlet for feeding a reactant into the tubes, an outlet for collecting the products of the reaction, 

 an inlet and an outlet for the flow of a thermal fluid inside the housing and around the tubes of the reactor, and a preheater to regulate a reactant temperature before feeding the reactant into the tubes. 1 1 . A method for manufacturing a reactor according to any claims 1 - 10, comprising the steps of: spreading a layer of metal powder onto a substrate plate, selectively melting the layer of metal powder, and repeating the previous steps. 12. The method according to claim 1 1 , further comprising the step of: lowering the substrate plate after selectively melting each layer of metal powder. 13. The method according to any claims 1 1 or 12, wherein each metal powder layer has a thickness of 20 - 100 micrometers.
